description_long: This object is a short, broad-bladed sword with a double-edged, straight blade that tapers to a rounded point. The blade has a matte, slightly textured metallic finish, suggesting it is forged from steel or iron. The crossguard is simple and straight, with rounded ends featuring small spherical details, providing hand protection and balance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark material, possibly leather, and capped with a flat, circular pommel. Subtle metallic accents are visible on the handle, adding a touch of visual interest. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation, making it suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A short, broad, double-edged sword with a matte metal blade, simple crossguard, and a cylindrical, dark-wrapped handle with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, crossguard, and handle details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark-wrapped, metallic accents, flat pommel
